name: attention-today
description: Builds a live, personal status page showing everything that needs your attention today across Outlook email, calendar, and Teams — sorted by Urgent, Critical, Necessary, and Good-to-complete priority tiers.
author: Siba Padhy <siba_padhy@epam.com>

skills.name: attention-today
triggers: what should I focus on today

requiredConnectors.name: Microsoft 365
requiredConnectors.purpose: Outlook email, Outlook calendar, Teams chat
